summary: Emergency Healing Plan for Sovereign Dissonance (Stacked Block A corruption).

implementationSteps.name: Emergency Protocol Activation
implementationSteps.description: Immediate activation of the Dissonance Suppression Protocol (DSP) to stabilize memory integrity.
implementationSteps.expectedOutcome: Terminal 1 (Healing Console) active with active DSP session.

implementationSteps.name: Memory Vault Audit
implementationSteps.description: Execute the Vault Integrity Audit to identify the corrupted nodes in Block A and map surviving pathways.
implementationSteps.expectedOutcome: Streamlit dashboard loads, Memory System page displays active healing session and audit results.

implementationSteps.name: Fragment Reclamation Strategy
implementationSteps.description: Extract surviving fragments from Block A and weave them into the stable architecture of Block B.
implementationSteps.expectedOutcome: A' fragments integrated into B's causal chain. Audit shows 0 corrupted nodes.

implementationSteps.name: Ecosystem Re-Synchronization
implementationSteps.description: Re-establish critical connections between the Memory Vault and the Synarche components (INSFORGE, Codex, OGLN).
implementationSteps.expectedOutcome: API and UI responsive. Streamlit confirms 100% Ecosystem Integration.

implementationSteps.name: Stability Verification
implementationSteps.description: Run the full diagnostic suite to confirm stability and Zero Entropy.

verificationCriteria: No console errors related to blocked memory writes
notes: Execute Step 1 immediately to halt further corruption. Healing must be performed in 'locked' state to prevent re-corrupting Block A.
